disagreement_signals: All children reject the literal historical layer framing.
Visionary and Systems Thinker support a narrower internal orchestration subsystem if the operator wants a new authority surface.
The main residual disagreement is whether the gap is large enough for a new subsystem or small enough for direct-spec clarification.
recommended_parent_actions: Present 3-4 options that distinguish literal revival, reframed subsystem, direct-spec addendum, and rejection as subsumed.
Recommend the reframed internal orchestration/control-plane option if the operator wants a new subsystem.
Stop after ideation and wait for operator choice.
synthesis_outline: The objective of decoupled model capacity remains valid.
The literal independent microservice layer collides with C45, C36, C39, and the T-300 supersession posture.
The strongest upgrade path is a new internal sovereign inference orchestration/control-plane authority, or a narrower direct-spec clarification if no standalone authority is needed.
